projects.title: Proxy PPC
projects.description: A lightweight HTTP proxy server written in Go using the Gin framework. It supports file forwarding, release version tracking, and download statistics, enabling the download of ClassiCube-PPC resources on older systems (it can also be used for other purposes).

projects.title: HTC-Services
projects.description: Server designed to restore and maintain HTC Sense 5.5 services on devices running Android 4.4.2 (KitKat). This project provides solutions to re-enable essential components such as sync services, widgets, themes, and other HTC-specific features that are no longer officially supported.
